data.title: Discounts on Russian Oil Widened for First Time Since Iran War
data.description: Discounts on Russia’s flagship crude widened for the first time since the start of the Iran war, as shifting expectations over a possible end to the Middle East conflict rattled oil markets.
data.keywords: Iran,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Russia,War,Middle East,Media,Donald John Trump,Tehran,Washington,Tax Revenue,markets
